name_en: Top-tier replica M12099 Black Neverfull Bandouliere Inside Out BB, a dual-sided version of the classic design, featuring the iconic Monogram canvas and grained leather on the front and back. The detachable zip pouch can be used alone or hung on the outside. The detachable shoulder strap allows for crossbody wear, while the eye-catching metal hardware adds refined details. Dimensions: 24 × 14 × 9 cm
